mutation: composite: a clause pays its weight ONLY if its number of satisfied literals is congruent to a per-clause target residue r modulo 3 (parity-coupled satisfaction); maximize paid weight. Adds a modular/number-theoretic gate on top of weighted MaxSAT so satisfying more literals can drop a clause off-phase.
title: Resonant Waggle Nectar: Parity-Gated Foraging Routes
strategies: single-pass per-bee best-response flips from all-WEST (one sweep, first-improvement)
single-flip hill climbing to convergence with multi-restart (all-WEST + all-EAST + deterministic random restarts), keep best
residue-aware move selection that targets clauses one flip away from their mod-3 target while respecting coupling across shared bees
